shape_semantics: Joint-necessity. code over (cmp,vp,vpc,naive) = L,L,W,_ : ONLY value_profile_cmplog resolves; cmplog blocks AND value_profile blocks; naive is NON-decisive (the `_` -- naive carries no winner/loser weight here). The vpc-only resolution asserts BOTH I2S and the CMP_MAP gradient are jointly required. Every branch carries TWO Pass-A signatures of ONE joint mechanism: an h0/h1 pair, one half attributed to I2S (vpc>value_profile => I2S necessary) and one to the CMP_MAP gradient (vpc>cmplog => value_profile necessary). harfbuzz/7170 is the one branch the classifier kept as a SINGLE joint signature rather than splitting h0/h1, but it is the same joint mechanism. The shape itself (Layer 1) already asserts jointness; the evidence test does NOT re-confirm it (that would violate G2 by verifying vpc-resolves with vpc-resolves). Instead it discriminates WHICH joint SUBTYPE each branch is, on a measurement INDEPENDENT of the resolve pattern: it reads the structural/value content of the cmplog-BLOCKING and value_profile-BLOCKING seed sets and asks what the gradient adds OVER I2S-only (cmplog) and what I2S adds OVER gradient-only (value_profile).

hypotheses.label: vpc assembles a LARGER, multi-field structure than I2S-only (cmplog) ever reaches; the gradient is necessary to grow size/token-count past where exact substitution stalls, and I2S is necessary because the gradient alone (value_profile) places ~0 structural tokens
hypotheses.prediction: On the value_profile-BLOCKING seed set the structural-token count is ~0 (vp_tags ~ 0): the gradient alone cannot place ANY exact multi-byte structural token (FOURCC table tag, ICC colorspace signature, XML markup literal), so I2S is necessary. AND the vpc-RESOLVING median seed is materially BIGGER than the cmplog-BLOCKING median seed (size_lift >= 1.3): the gradient grows the multi-field header/content-model structure past where exact-substitution-only (cmplog) plateaus, so the gradient is necessary. A pure-I2S-substitution mechanism (no assembly depth) would predict size_lift ~ 1.0 (vpc and cmplog reach the SAME-sized structure, cmplog just hasn't placed the one tag yet); a pure-gradient mechanism would predict vp_tags > 0 (the gradient could place tokens on its own). Only the assembly-depth joint predicts BOTH vp_tags~0 AND size_lift>=1.3.

hypotheses.label: vpc and cmplog reach a SIMILARLY-sized input (size_lift ~ 1), but vpc lands a specific gradient-climbed VALUE (a single exact multi-byte keyword/token) that the cmplog-blocking seeds approach byte-by-byte yet never reach; I2S is still necessary to splice the keyword operand, and the gradient is necessary for the last-mile prefix precision that the structural size proxy is blind to

params.comment: NEW descriptor (not yet built; SAME tool as i2s_vp_LLWL's joint_value_precision -- dedup at build). For the branch's decisive CMP site, take the target operand value from the signature (here the exact SQL keyword/identifier token, e.g. 'PRAGMA' = 50 52 41 47 4d 41 for all four sqlite3 branches; operand_width_bytes=6). Compute the MINIMUM byte-distance (Hamming over the operand-width window, or edit/prefix distance for the variable-length keyword window) between the target value and the value found at the cmp-site offset across (a) the vpc-RESOLVING seed set => vpc_min_distance and (b) the cmplog-BLOCKING seed set => cmp_min_distance. distance_closure_ratio = (cmp_min_distance - vpc_min_distance) / max(cmp_min_distance, 1).
params.operand_source: signature.operand_literal / operand_width_bytes ('PRAGMA', 6); cmp-site offset is the input head (offset 0x00 per the cards: 'PRAGMA' at 0x00-0x05) -- confirm via per-role coverage overlay / analysis byte-diff (W-vs-L divergent offset)
params.feasibility: value-precision tool NOT yet built (registry_tool null) -> orchestrator must build + register value_distance_reached before this hypothesis can score. All four value-precision members are sqlite3, which HAS an on-disk corpus AND is among the 286 reps with resolving_seeds+blocking_seeds in the DB, so they are scorable once the tool is built.

hypotheses.prediction: Inputs are the SAME size (size_lift ~ 1.0 -- a 'PRAGMA <name>;' statement is no bigger than the SELECT/junk blocking fragments; the assembly-depth proxy is blind here) BUT the vpc-resolving seeds reach a keyword value strictly CLOSER to the exact target token than the cmplog-blocking seeds ever do: cmp_min_distance > 0 (cmplog seeds prefix-collide on a byte or two of 'PRAGMA' but never accrete the full keyword) while vpc_min_distance ~ 0 (vpc lands the verbatim keyword), so distance_closure_ratio is large. A pure-I2S mechanism would predict cmp_min_distance ~ 0 too (cmplog HAS I2S, so if a single substitution sufficed cmplog would also land the keyword and resolve -- contradicting the L label); the fact that cmplog approaches-but-misses is exactly what the CMP_MAP prefix-distance gradient supplies. This rules out 'I2S alone is enough' AND, because size_lift~1, rules out the assembly-depth story.

notes: COLLAPSE / MERGE record: this shape has 16 branches; 15 carry an h0/h1 signature pair (h0=one-technique-necessary, h1=the-other) and harfbuzz/7170 carries a single joint signature -- 31 signatures total, all of ONE joint mechanism per branch. Layer 1 asserts joint-necessity; jointness is NOT re-tested (G2 -- would 'verify vpc-resolves with vpc-resolves'). The only discriminable question the data supports is the joint SUBTYPE, and the empirical harfbuzz/LLWL run established exactly two (assembly-depth and value-precision). I therefore COLLAPSED the THREE prior-hint Pass-B clusters -- which were split by TECHNIQUE-HALF (i2s_exact_literal_substitution_joint_necessity = all the h0/I2S halves; vp_gradient_structural_climb_joint_necessity = all the h1/gradient halves; i2s_vp_joint_fourcc_and_structural_header = harfbuzz/7170's single joint signature) NOT by subtype -- and RE-SPLIT them by the LLWL-established axis: whether the joint mechanism grows a multi-field STRUCTURE (assembly-depth, size_lift>=1.3) or climbs a single exact VALUE at constant size (value-precision, size_lift~1). The prior clusters are useless as subtype hints because each one mixes both subtypes (it slices the I2S half from the gradient half of the SAME branch), so I ignore their membership and route by structure-vs-value: (A) joint_assembly_depth absorbs every branch whose winning seed is a grown multi-field container -- all harfbuzz CPAL/COLR/glyf/CFF/sfnt font-table headers (6812,6813,6814,6815,6858,7170,7239,7245), the lcms multi-field ICC colorspace/PCS FOURCC chain (2674), and the libxml2 DTD/regexp automaton content-model assembly (7296,7311,9361) -- 12 branches; the font and ICC and XML variants are NOT discriminable from each other by any real-data measurement (all three are 'gradient grows a multi-field structure past I2S-only', measured identically by joint_necessity; only the --tokens vocabulary differs by target, which is a param not a different test), so they FOLD together. (B) joint_value_precision absorbs the four sqlite3 PRAGMA branches (16001,16016,16022,16118): the decisive feature is a SINGLE exact multi-byte keyword token ('PRAGMA') that cmplog prefix-collides on but never lands, at CONSTANT input size (a PRAGMA statement is no bigger than the SELECT/junk blocking seeds) -- its hallmark is size_lift~1 with a value-distance gap the size proxy cannot see, so it stays separate with the value-precision descriptor. SAME two-subtype split as i2s_vp_LLWL, same two descriptors (joint_necessity reused as-is; value_distance_reached is the SAME new tool LLWL also requested -- dedup at build). TARGET DISTRIBUTION: harfbuzz 8 (all assembly), libxml2 3 (assembly), lcms 1 (assembly), sqlite3 4 (value-precision). --tokens is target-specific: font tags for harfbuzz, ICC FOURCCs for lcms, XML structural literals for libxml2, supplied per-target in params.tokens_by_target. CAVEATS / FEASIBILITY: (a) joint_value_precision's descriptor is NOT built yet (registry_tool null) -- orchestrator must build value_distance_reached first (it is the SAME tool LLWL needs); assembly_depth reuses the validated joint_necessity tool as-is. (b) DATA-REALITY compliance: NO seed_lineage 'I2S event' is used (I2S untagged); NO byte-alignment/byte_freq_ratio is used (joint gates have different-SIZED W vs L seeds), instead struct_size/token_count (assembly) and value_distance over the operand-width window (value-precision). (c) on-disk corpora exist only for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 -- of this shape's targets harfbuzz + sqlite3 have on-disk corpus; lcms + libxml2 are among the 286 reps with resolving_seeds+blocking_seeds in the DB, which is the seed_set source both descriptors consume (NOT corpus_queue), so all 16 branches are scorable once the value-precision tool is built. (d) member_hint_branches are my best a-priori structure-vs-value split from gate content; they are HINTS for the arbiter, NOT labels -- the deterministic rule over the named metrics makes the actual per-branch call. decision_order tries assembly_depth first because its vp_tags<0.3 AND size_lift>=1.3 conjunction is the more specific (harder-to-accidentally-satisfy) rule; anything failing it falls through to value-precision, and a branch matching NEITHER (e.g. size_lift>=1.3 but vp_tags>0.3, or size_lift<1.3 but no value-distance gap) is honestly left inconclusive rather than force-fit.
